'''Sencil Corporation''', also known as the '''Cencil Corporation''', was headquartered on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Churba]]. It manufactured matrixes and mission specific components for the [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droid]] [[Black market/Legends|black market]].<ref name="GNN6" /> Alongside [[Bansche Tech/Legends|Bansche Tech]], [[SGI Systems, Inc.]] and [[Reiber Manufacturing]], Sencil Corporation was reformed into the [[Imperial Droid Corporation]].<ref name="PP" />
